properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We′re living in the evening time The race is almost through God has chosen you and me There's still a job to do The Word that′s been revealed to us Must be prophesied again And the message must reach everywhere 'Til the last soul has come in

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We are the generation We're the culmination The final voice the world will hear The coming of the Lord is near Living out the revelation Overcoming sin′s temptation The Truth will go to every tongue and nation We are the chosen generation

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Committed to the calling Together we stand strong Lifting up our voice as one We′ll sing the final song God has chosen us to conquer Every test we face He has seen us through this far And we'll finish by His grace

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We are the generation We′re the culmination The final voice the world will hear The coming of the Lord is near Living out the revelation Overcoming sin's temptation The Truth will go to every tongue and nation We are the chosen generation

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We are the chosen generation Generation
